name: Meat and Potato Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Round steak or top round,
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 6-quart pot.
2. Add beef, salt, pepper, and oregano.
3. Brown the meat well.
4. Stir in tomato paste, wine, and water until the meat is almost covered.
5. Mix everything together until the gravy thickens slightly.
6. Simmer for 45 minutes.
7. Add potatoes and simmer until fork-tender, stirring occasionally about 15-20 minutes.
8. Serve hot with fresh Italian bread.
